description: Style Note Designed for those who never compromise on comfort and style, this sandal from ganuchi is a great buy. Slip into it and pair it with jeans and casual T-shirts for unparalleled cool. Product Details Round open toed black slip on sandals Leather upper which covers the forefoot and midfoot region, has stitched detail, cut outs on the side and elasticated insert in the centre Soft footbed and soft inner lining Upper stitched to the outsole Tough rubber outsole with grooves Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain the shine
